rows.label: tlk47100071_01_msg0001
rows.name:
What? You tryin' to rub my
tummy like a Nopon or sumfing?

rows.label: tlk47100071_01_msg0002
rows.name:
Eh? You can understand me?!
Heh, life's full o' surprises.

rows.label: tlk47100071_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Then tell the children here
something for me, would you?

rows.label: tlk47100071_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Tell them to leave my tails alone.
If they want to pet me, they
should pet my head instead.
